since_last: 29% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.84%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 29% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.51% · Gold +0.05% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 29% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.84%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.84%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -5.59%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.48%, SMCI +3.20%, INTC +3.06%, VRT +2.38%, TSM +2.17%. Laggards: SPCX -5.59%, SAP -3.24%, APP -2.13%, GOOGL -1.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.59% at $174.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
